title: Proper Fletching
description: Adds proper utility to the fletching table, allowing arrows and potions to be crafted into tipped arrows.
body:
# Proper Fletching

**Proper Fletching** gives the fletching table real functionality in vanilla-style gameplay.

Instead of being mostly decorative, the fletching table can now be used to craft **tipped arrows** using arrows and potions — no crafting table clutter, no custom items, just a clean and intuitive interface.

---

## ✨ Features

- Adds a **custom fletching table interface**
- Combine **arrows + potions** to create tipped arrows
- Supports:
  - Regular potions
  - Splash potions
  - Lingering potions
- Uses **vanilla tipped arrows** (no duplicates or replacements)
- Returns empty **glass bottles** when using potion bottles
- Vanilla-friendly and lightweight

---

## 🏹 How It Works

1. Open a **Fletching Table**
2. Insert:
   - **Arrows** in the top slot
   - **Potion** in the bottom slot
3. Take the **tipped arrows** from the output slot

### Output Amount
- **Regular potion** → up to **32** tipped arrows
- **Splash or lingering potion** → up to **16** tipped arrows

The potion’s effects are transferred directly to the arrows.


![Potion Bottles work on up to 32 arrows at once](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f7ee066e468587ec8238e4566b588653a059909_0.webp)
Potion Bottles work on up to 32 arrows at once, returning an empty bottle

![Splash Potions work on up to 16 arrows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7a2bbb4f56f9127d6d17b08b22b185c6cc67c73_0.webp)
Splash Potions work on up to 16 arrows and are used up when crafted

![Lingering Potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fd38d8f1e4b07607317c67d785ea8f3f9d6971a_0.webp)
Lingering Potions work the same way as splash potions

---

## ⚙️ Compatibility

- Designed for **vanilla-style progression**
- No recipe conflicts
- Works alongside other mods that don’t replace the fletching table
- Server-side safe (clients only need the mod for the UI)

---

## 📦 Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.9-1.21.11**
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
